form.formComment: Won two starts back over 390m at this track. Last start she finished 2nd on April 13 over 390m at this track behind Saint Xavier beaten 1.4 lengths (22.58) in a Grade 5. Draw likely to suit. Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked on first turn.

form.formComment: Lines up chasing three wins on end after scoring over 390m at this track in 22.47 last time, set up by a fast early sectional. Looks well placed to make it three straight.

form.formComment: Resumes from a three-and-a-half months spell and was a winner at only other fresh up run, scoring in 18.11 over 305m at Mt Gambier. Others hold stronger claims.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Moraine Trevor at this track last start over 390m (22.51). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.
